registration.uiPath: Administration > Apps > Webhooks (or Administration > General > Webhooks, depending on version)
registration.note: No public API to register webhooks programmatically. Configure a URL, tick the activity types you care about, set optional custom headers.

signing.note: HMAC verification is opt-in per webhook config. If you enable signing, NinjaOne sends the hex-encoded SHA-256 HMAC. If you don't enable signing, add a static bearer token via the webhook's custom headers for lightweight authentication.

transport.retries: Exponential backoff for ~24h on non-2xx responses

notes: NinjaOne ships activities via a uniform Activity envelope. The 'activityType' + 'statusCode' fields identify the specific event.
activityTime is a Unix timestamp with millisecond fraction (as a float).
Payload shapes below follow NinjaOne's documented activity schema. Specific field combinations vary per activity type.
